props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about AC Installation & Replacement in {city}

faqs.question: How do I know when it's time to replace my AC unit?
faqs.answer: Consider replacement if your system is over 10-15 years old, requires frequent repairs, has rising energy bills, or uses outdated R-22 refrigerant. Our technicians can assess your system and recommend the best option.

faqs.question: How long does a new AC installation take?
faqs.answer: A standard AC installation typically takes one day. More complex installations involving ductwork modifications or multi-zone systems may take 2-3 days. We'll provide a clear timeline before starting.

faqs.question: What size AC unit do I need for my home?
faqs.answer: The right size depends on your home's square footage, insulation, number of windows, and other factors. Our team performs a detailed load calculation to recommend the perfect system size for optimal comfort and efficiency.
